summary: Testing of new features for Spark Fit completed successfully. All 4 new features verified working: (1) Forgot password link on login page redirecting to WhatsApp, (2) Admin attendance buttons (Asistió/Ausente) visible for confirmed bookings, (3) Admin password change modal working, (4) Client booking history showing correct status labels.
seed_data_creation: Created test booking booking_b857a4e30b0b for testing attendance buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) /api/admin/attendance - marks bookings as 'attended' or 'absent', 2) /api/admin/change-password - admin can change user passwords, 3) Forgot password link redirects to WhatsApp, 4) Client booking history shows status labels (Asistió, Ausente, Cancelada, Confirmada). All APIs and UI elements verified working.

forgot_password_link.details: Link '¿Olvidaste tu contraseña?' visible on login page with data-testid='forgot-password-link', redirects to WhatsApp

admin_attendance_buttons.details: Admin can see 'Asistió' and 'Ausente' buttons in both Reservas tab and Itinerario del Día for confirmed bookings only

admin_password_change.details: Admin can see 'Contraseña' button in Users tab, modal opens with password input, API validates minimum 6 characters

client_booking_history.details: Client dashboard shows booking history with status labels: Asistió (green), Ausente (red), Cancelada (muted), Confirmada (blue)

api_attendance.details: POST /api/admin/attendance - validates auth, admin role, valid status values, booking exists

api_change_password.details: POST /api/admin/change-password - validates auth, admin role, user exists, min 6 char password
